text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of Gold Ship's grand battle with Eishin
Flash in the Arima Kinen has arrived....

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna land a big one today! Let's do this
thing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's even more pumped than usual and
absolutely ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You know my dad was a fisherman, right? Well,
he told me something one day.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
He said: "Rough waters are inevitable in life, but
you've got an angler's spirit strong enough to ride
them out."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I bet Flash is trying to land a big one, just like I
am...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But I'll never let her take over the line where the
Kuroshio Current and Oyashio Current meet! I
stake my old man's name on it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go out there and catch a hundred
squids! No, scratch that—a thousand! Squids for
aaaall!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's so powered up that she leaves before
I can even wish her good luck.
